name: Fairfield
description_short: Fairfield Inn and Suites is a hotel chain operated by Marriott International, not a consumer finance company. The website provided is for a specific hotel property in Cheyenne, Wyoming.
description_long: Fairfield Inn and Suites is a hotel brand owned and operated by Marriott International, one of the world's largest hospitality companies. The company operates hundreds of hotel properties across North America and internationally, focusing on mid-scale, limited-service accommodations. Fairfield properties are not financial services providers and do not offer any payday loans, personal loans, credit services, or alternative financial products. The website URL provided (a Marriott hotel property in Cheyenne, Wyoming) returned an access error, preventing verification of specific amenities, but the domain clearly indicates this is a hotel booking and property information page. This company has been incorrectly categorized as a payday-alternative lender. Fairfield operates exclusively in the hospitality sector and should not appear in any consumer finance database. The presence of this company in CreditDoc represents a significant data classification error that requires immediate correction and removal from the finance-related categories.
